description_long: This is a compact, handheld electric drill with a predominantly bright yellow-green and black color scheme, featuring ergonomic rubberized grip panels for comfort and control. The body is constructed from durable plastic with visible ventilation slots on the upper housing for heat dissipation. The front section includes a black, ribbed chuck holding a metallic twist drill bit, and a clear trigger button is integrated into the handle. Branding and safety labels are visible on the side, with the 'RYOBI' logo prominently displayed. The base of the handle is labeled 'lithium,' indicating a built-in battery pack as the power source. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban repair settings.
description: A compact, yellow-green and black electric drill with ergonomic grip, visible branding, and a twist drill bit attached. Features include a trigger button, ventilation slots, and a built-in battery pack.
description_view_0: The left side of the drill shows the ergonomic grip, trigger button, and a safety label near the top.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the black chuck with the twist drill bit and the top ventilation slots.
description_view_2: The right side displays the prominent 'RYOBI' logo, grip texture, and the 'lithium' label at the handle base.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the back of the handle, showing the grip texture and the bottom of the battery compartment.
